ot_description: Added an Issue to Employee action for the experience and relieving letters across the backend and frontend. Fixed the relieving letter rendering with a blank body (footer detection was matching the recipient address), removed a duplicated footer in the PDFs, added rollback notifications when HR recalls a letter, and switched the employee View button to the secure file endpoints.

standup.name: Smit Parekh
inProgress: Fix relieving letter blank body — isFooterAddressElement paragraph check scoped, backend restart + PDF verification pending
next: Restart backend and regenerate relieving letter for Mihir Panchal (exit 1674) to verify full body content in PDF

tasks.name: Add "Issue to Employee" button (backend + frontend)
tasks.body: Added issue() methods in ExperienceLetterServiceImpl and RelievingLetterServiceImpl, new /issue controller endpoints, API mutations in resignationApi.ts, and Issue to Employee button in DocumentCard, ExitDetailScreen, and LettersSection
tasks.summary:
- Added issue() in ExperienceLetterServiceImpl and RelievingLetterServiceImpl (released=true, in-app notification only)
- Added POST /{exitId}/experience/issue and POST /{exitId}/relieving/issue endpoints in ExitLetterController
- Added issueExperienceLetter and issueRelievingLetter mutations in resignationApi.ts and exitLetterApi.ts
- Added Issue to Employee button in DocumentCard.tsx with onIssue/issueLoading props
- Wired up mutations and props in ExitDetailScreen.tsx and LettersSection.tsx

tasks.name: Fix relieving letter blank body (letterhead merge detection)
tasks.body: isFooterAddressElement() paragraph check was matching Monarch Innovation Private Limited in the letter recipient block, cutting off all body content; scoped paragraph stop to CIN/GSTIN/DUNS only, table stop uses Dwarkesh/CIN/GSTIN
tasks.summary:
- Identified root cause: looksLikeFooterText() checked text.startsWith("monarch innovation private limited") for paragraphs, matching the recipient address line in the letter body
- Split detection logic: paragraph check now only stops at CIN:/GSTIN:/DUNS: lines
- Table check detects footer by dwarkesh business hub, CIN:, GSTIN:, DUNS:, or company name with trailing content
- Removed shared looksLikeFooterText() helper; inlined distinct logic for paragraph vs table

tasks.name: Add rollback notification for experience/relieving letters
tasks.body: When HR rolls back an issued letter, employee now receives an in-app notification; added EXPERIENCE_LETTER_RECALLED and RELIEVING_LETTER_RECALLED to NotificationType enum
tasks.summary:
- Added EXPERIENCE_LETTER_RECALLED and RELIEVING_LETTER_RECALLED to NotificationType.java
- Updated rollback() in ExperienceLetterServiceImpl to call notificationService.notify() with EXPERIENCE_LETTER_RECALLED
- Updated rollback() in RelievingLetterServiceImpl to call notificationService.notify() with RELIEVING_LETTER_RECALLED
- Wrapped notification calls in try/catch to avoid failing the rollback transaction

tasks.name: Fix double footer in letter PDFs
tasks.body: Letter PDFs were showing two footer blocks — one inline from the letter template body, one from the letterhead footer section; fixed isFooterAddressElement() to correctly detect and strip the inline footer table before merge
tasks.summary:
- Diagnosed two-footer issue: letter template had inline address block (two-column table) that was being copied into letterhead body along with the letterhead's own footer section
- Fixed isFooterAddressElement() to detect the inline footer table by unique identifiers (Dwarkesh Business Hub, CIN, GSTIN)
- Verified letterhead footer section carries company address + Great Place to Work badge; inline copy is no longer duplicated

tasks.name: Fix employee View button to use secure endpoints
tasks.body: Employee View button in MyExitScreen was passing raw viewUrl (storage path) to openDoc; fixed to use /my/experience/file, /my/relieving/file, /my/fnf/file secure endpoints instead
tasks.summary:
- Identified security gap: toEmployeeResponse() correctly omits viewUrl, but openDoc was receiving null/undefined
- Fixed MyExitScreen.tsx onView handler to build secureUrl from key (experience/relieving/fnf) mapping to /api/offboarding/letters/my/*/file endpoints
- Consistent with existing employee-facing API design (no raw storage paths exposed)

ot_pushed.summary: Added an Issue to Employee action for the experience and relieving letters across the backend and frontend. Fixed the relieving letter rendering with a blank body (footer detection was matching the recipient address), removed a duplicated footer in the PDFs, added rollback notifications when HR recalls a letter, and switched the employee View button to the secure file endpoints.
